item.title: How House Walls Are Made
item.description: Follow the process of building house walls, from framing and structural support to preparing them for insulation and exterior finishes.

media:content.media:title: How House Walls Are Made
media:content.media:description: Follow the process of building house walls, from framing and structural support to preparing them for insulation and exterior finishes.

item.title: Roof Sealing for a Kitchen Remodel
item.description: The kitchen remodel continues with proper roof sealing, helping protect the home from moisture while preparing the space for the next phase of construction.

media:content.media:title: Roof Sealing for a Kitchen Remodel
media:content.media:description: The kitchen remodel continues with proper roof sealing, helping protect the home from moisture while preparing the space for the next phase of construction.

item.title: Building A Dream Home
item.description: A look at the building process behind a dream home, with focus on construction progress, craftsmanship, tools, and hands-on work. What part of the build do you like to follow most?

media:content.media:title: Building A Dream Home
media:content.media:description: A look at the building process behind a dream home, with focus on construction progress, craftsmanship, tools, and hands-on work. What part of the build do you like to follow most?

item.title: Tips and Tricks: Porch Roof Edition
item.description: A practical look at porch roof tips and tricks from the job site, with a focus on building process, tools, and project progress. What details matter most when framing a porch roof?

media:content.media:title: Tips and Tricks: Porch Roof Edition
media:content.media:description: A practical look at porch roof tips and tricks from the job site, with a focus on building process, tools, and project progress. What details matter most when framing a porch roof?

item.title: Filling the Wall Sheathing | House Build Day 25
item.description: Wall sheathing is being filled in on House Build Day 25, showing steady progress on the build and the hands-on work that moves the project forward. What comes next on the job site?

media:content.media:title: Filling the Wall Sheathing | House Build Day 25
media:content.media:description: Wall sheathing is being filled in on House Build Day 25, showing steady progress on the build and the hands-on work that moves the project forward. What comes next on the job site?

item.title: Let's Try Something New: 100% Level Every Time
item.description: A practical look at keeping work level every time on the job site. This video focuses on the building process, tools, and careful craftsmanship behind the result. What would you use this method for?

media:content.media:title: Let's Try Something New: 100% Level Every Time
media:content.media:description: A practical look at keeping work level every time on the job site. This video focuses on the building process, tools, and careful craftsmanship behind the result. What would you use this method for?

item.title: 3 Useful Methods to Sharpen Building Tools
item.description: A practical look at three methods for sharpening building tools, with a focus on keeping tools ready for work and maintaining good cutting performance. Which method do you use most often?

media:content.media:title: 3 Useful Methods to Sharpen Building Tools

item.title: Creating a Solid Foundation for a New House Build
item.description: A look at the foundation work for a new house build, focusing on the building process and the steps that help set the project up for the next phase. What comes after the foundation is in place?

item.title: Building a Mountain Home Part 5: Concrete Day
item.description: Part 5 of the mountain home build focuses on concrete day and the work that goes into it. A practical look at the building process, tools, and site progress on this project. What comes next?

media:content.media:description: Part 5 of the mountain home build focuses on concrete day and the work that goes into it. A practical look at the building process, tools, and site progress on this project. What comes next?

item.title: How To Pour Concrete Correctly
item.description: A practical look at pouring concrete the right way, with a focus on the process, tools, and jobsite steps that help support a solid finish. What matters most when getting concrete placed and finished?

media:content.media:title: How To Pour Concrete Correctly
media:content.media:description: A practical look at pouring concrete the right way, with a focus on the process, tools, and jobsite steps that help support a solid finish. What matters most when getting concrete placed and finished?

item.title: Let the Hammer Championships Begin
item.description: A look at skilled hammer work in a hands-on building challenge, highlighting technique, precision, and tool control in practical construction tasks. From striking accuracy to material handling, this showcase focuses on craftsmanship in action. What part of the technique stands out most?

media:content.media:title: Let the Hammer Championships Begin
media:content.media:description: A look at skilled hammer work in a hands-on building challenge, highlighting technique, precision, and tool control in practical construction tasks. From striking accuracy to material handling, this showcase focuses on craftsmanship in action. What part of the technique stands out most?

item.title: The Secret To Building Stairs
item.description: A clear look at the process and planning behind building stairs, focusing on measurement accuracy, structure, and step alignment. The showcase highlights how proper technique ensures safety and consistency in construction. What part of stair building do you find most interesting?

media:content.media:title: The Secret To Building Stairs
media:content.media:description: A clear look at the process and planning behind building stairs, focusing on measurement accuracy, structure, and step alignment. The showcase highlights how proper technique ensures safety and consistency in construction. What part of stair building do you find most interesting?

item.title: Building Something Special, One Episode at a Time
item.description: A look at the ongoing building process, with each episode adding another step in the project. Focused on hands-on work, craftsmanship, and steady progress on the job site. What comes next?

media:content.media:description: A look at the ongoing building process, with each episode adding another step in the project. Focused on hands-on work, craftsmanship, and steady progress on the job site. What comes next?

item.title: Genius Tool for Easier Building Work
item.description: An overview of a practical building tool designed to simplify construction work and improve efficiency on-site. The focus is on usability, design improvements, and how it supports faster and more accurate results. Which feature would be most useful in real work?
